text:
September 3rd: Part 16 (93⑯, Kugatsu Mikka (Jū Roku)) is the 100 th chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

As the blast continues to shake the Cemetery Building and smoke billows out from the first floor, Bean tries his best to calm down the worried Mafia members, telling them to follow him to the auction hall to watch a live video from the Ten Dons. One of the members makes sure that it's not being held in the basement, and Bean assures him that they moved it to the tenth floor. The man is glad that they will be able to follow Neon's fortune about avoiding stairs that they haven't already climbed, with two others confirming the accuracy of her fortunes.

In the crowded auction hall, a member of the Ten Dons appears on screen and reveals that the Phantom Troupe's leader has been killed, causing the Mafia members to cheer and applaud. The Don assures them that the other members will be killed in due time, adding that he and the other Dons will watch the auction as the camera shows all of them sitting around a table. However, at the Dons' location, a fly suddenly lands on one of their eyes as several of Illumi's needles are shown in the back of his head. Illumi appears in the doorway and activates the Zoldyck personal transmitter.

Back in the Cemetery Building, as the smoke clears around them, Silva says that the device only rings when an assassination has been successfully completed. After Silva answers and Illumi asks where his client is, Chrollo and Zeno are shown freeing themselves from the rubble. Illumi asks if they were just now fighting, glad to hear that Chrollo is still alive and relaying the message that they have dealt with the Ten Dons. As Illumi tells him to wire the money, Kalluto and a short, old man are also seen at the Dons' location.

Zeno is relieved to be through with the fight, and Chrollo asks him if he plans to finish him off. Zeno tells him that since the Dons were their clients and they're no longer alive, any arrangement with them is now void. The tattered Chrollo replies that he won't get another chance to fight and kill him, and Zeno asks if he thinks that they do jobs for fun, adding that they don't enjoy killing and that he doesn't want to work or die for nothing. Chrollo then asks who would have won if they were fighting one-on-one, and Zeno confidently replies that he would have, but adds that it would be a different matter if Chrollo were actually trying to kill him.

After the two Zoldycks leave the ruined room, Chrollo falls exhausted to the floor and tells himself that he wouldn't have been able to steal his ability. As Neon rests in a room with Light by her side, Melody calls Kurapika and asks if they should wait at the hospital, which Kurapika confirms since things are too dangerous at the Cemetery Building. The doctor says that the unconscious Neon should be fine, but still advises taking her to the hospital since it would be safer. Light worries about moving her, but Kurapika assures him that the Troupe would have already attacked the ambulance if they had wanted to do so.

As the ambulance transports Neon to the hospital, Chrollo exits the building and takes off his headband, telling the other members by phone to forget about the ambulance and continue with the plan. Inside the auction hall, the announcer begins the event with the first item as the crowd cheers and applauds. Bean walks backstage and pulls out a cigarette, happy that the frightening situation is now resolved and none of the capos were hurt. He has trouble finding his lighter, and someone suddenly holds it up from the darkness, with the light revealing Hisoka's face. Before Bean can react, Machi quickly appears and hangs him with her thread.

The announcer introduces the first item, a Solid-Gold Execution Sword from the Yul National Treasury, which Pakunoda wheels out onto the stage. As the bid reaches 50 million, it's revealed that Shalnark is using his Black Voice ability to control the announcer. The manipulated announcer then introduces a Celadon Porcelain Vase from the Lai Dynasty, which the Troupe members find among the items. Shizuku hands it to Kortopi, who uses his Gallery Fake ability to create an exact copy of it. The announcer starts the bidding on the fake item at 100 million, and the amount quickly climbs to 380 million.

Kurapika approaches two Mafia members and asks them if the auction has started. The two inform him that the Troupe's leader was killed and that the assassins are looking for the others. Zenji approaches the confused Kurapika and says that the two Zoldycks took care of the job while he was wasting time with the ambulance. He mockingly tells him to go fawn over Neon at the hospital or hotel, but as he asks if he wants to hold his master's hand, Kurapika suddenly punches him directly in the face. As the bloody Zenji falls to the floor, Kurapika tells himself that he won't believe the leader of the Troupe to be dead until he sees it with his own eyes.
